accurate.why: Correctly describes disapproval of the FWS rule and states the resolution 'would reverse the Fish and Wildlife Service's decision to grant endangered species status,' which is accurate.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all details are in the bill or accurate context.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies this as a CRA disapproval of the FWS northern long-eared bat rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the rule would have no force or effect and explains the CRA mechanism.

effective_dates.why: No separate effective date specified; notes Senate passage May 11, 2023.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers disapproval, Fed. Reg. cite, operative effect, and legislative context.

correct_entities.why: U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service and CRA correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: 87 Fed. Reg. 73488, November 30, 2022, and May 11, 2023 match bill text.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
